data.body: Fix implemented in worktree ~/rebar-venv-fix (branch bug/resolve-symbol-venv). Added _is_dependency_path() to fs_tools + gated resolve_symbol classification. Local make lint/typecheck + affected tests green. Pushed to Gerrit as change 711 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/711); awaiting LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1.
